title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
